name: AI Adoption Strategy for GTM
description: Team discusses implementing AI across GTM workflows — from AI SDRs to predictive scoring — simulating adoption barriers and productivity gains.
seed_text:
Intercom's GTM leadership is evaluating a comprehensive AI adoption strategy across the revenue organization. The goal is to increase rep productivity by 40% without proportional headcount growth, enabling the team to scale from $240M to $400M ARR with the current 280-person GTM org.

AI initiatives under consideration:
1. AI SDR (Conversica/11x.ai): Automate top-of-funnel outreach — previous pilot with Conversica achieved 74% open rates but 0% meetings booked. New vendor (11x.ai) claims 3-5% meeting conversion.
2. AI-Assisted Discovery: Use call intelligence (Gong + GPT) to auto-generate discovery summaries, identify buying signals, and suggest next-best-actions. Pilot showed AEs save 45 min/day but quality of insights varies.
3. Predictive Lead Scoring: Replace the current MQL model (12% conversion) with an ML-based scoring model trained on closed-won patterns. Data science team estimates 22% conversion rate with the new model.
4. AI Deal Coaching: Real-time deal risk scoring using CRM activity patterns + call sentiment analysis. Early prototype flagged 8 of 11 deals that eventually churned from pipeline.
5. AI-Generated Proposals: Auto-generate SOWs and proposals from CRM data + call transcripts. Current avg time from verbal agreement to proposal sent: 4.2 days. AI target: same day.
6. CS Copilot: AI assistant for CSMs that summarizes account health, drafts QBR decks, and identifies expansion triggers. Would allow CSM ratio to go from 1:85 to 1:120.

Concerns raised by the team:
- Reps fear AI will replace their jobs — union of concerns from 3 recent all-hands
- Data quality: CRM hygiene is poor — 34% of opportunity fields are incomplete
- Integration complexity: Current tech stack is Salesforce + Outreach + Gong + Intercom — adding more AI tools creates vendor sprawl
- ROI measurement: How do we attribute productivity gains to AI vs other factors?

The simulation should model adoption curves for each AI initiative, predict productivity impact, identify resistance points, and recommend a phased rollout strategy.
expected_outputs: AI initiative prioritization matrix by ROI and feasibility
Rep productivity gain forecast by role
Total cost of ownership vs headcount savings analysis
Rep sentiment prediction under different rollout approaches
